items.content: Iran launched missiles and drones targeting Israel and several Gulf states early Sunday, a day after Trump imposed a 48-hour deadline on Tehran to reach a deal or face intensified military action. Iran strikes Gulf energy sites, Israel after Trump ultimatum.
Trump says US airman rescued in Iran in 'miraculous' operation - Breitbart
Trump issues fresh warning to Iran: strike a deal or face consequences over Strait of Hormuz (with video)
Sky News Defence Analyst Peter Jennings: Trump's 48h deadline to Iran won't make much difference - he keeps making deadlines that don't materialize
Trump indecisive on ceasefire with Iran: promises and threats remain the same (NepalPress)
Don't run to shelters, fight with Iran and don't cry for ceasefire
HOW WEAK THE PRESIDENT OF USA LOOKS WHEN HE KEEPS BEGGING FOR A CEASEFIRE under threat of transforming Iran to a stone age (quoting Pete Hegseth)
US couldn't defeat Hamas and won't defeat Iran, you guys are begging for a ceasefire hahahhaha
No ceasefire, jets down (with video). #IranWar trending
BREAKING: President Trump announces second F-15E pilot shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran
BREAKING: Second crew member from downed F-15E rescued after heavy firefight - still must exfiltrate from Iran
Netflix ordered to reimburse Italian subscribers after court rules price hikes illegal
Michael Saylor says four-year Bitcoin cycle is 'dead'
